title: Luna Safe Self-Upgrade Gate Policy
description: Phase 5F policy/config for the Safe Self-Upgrade Gate. Conservative defaults: no installs, no external network, no personality/goal changes, no memory deletes, small max-diff sizes. Operator may override per-proposal with explicit flags, never silently.

default_autonomy_tier.description: 0 read-only, 1 logs/reports, 2 edit-with-preview, 3 sandbox auto-edit, 4 trusted full-auto on allowlist, 5 emergency repair only. Phase 5F default is 1 or 2 (not full-auto).

max_files_changed.description: Hard ceiling on files_changed in diff_stats.

critical_files.description: Files where any edit is critical-risk and never auto-allowed without explicit operator approval.

high_risk_files.description: Files where edits are high-risk and require approval beyond Tier 2.

forbidden_delete_prefixes.description: Path prefixes (POSIX, project-relative) where delete/truncate/move operations are denied. memory/, logs/, aider_jobs/, backups/, uploads/, tasks/, solutions/, logic_updates/, director_jobs/.

secret_path_patterns.description: Regex patterns matching paths that must never be edited by autonomy. .env, api_vault*, *token*, *key*, *secret*.

install_command_patterns.description: Regex patterns for unapproved install/install-like commands.

external_network_patterns.description: Regex patterns flagging non-localhost external URLs/hostnames.

generated_runtime_report_patterns.description: Glob/regex hints for generated artifacts that must remain gitignored.
